scripts.up: docker-compose --profile full -f tools/docker-compose.dev.yml -f tools/docker-compose.override.yml -p p0 up --build
scripts.up:api: docker-compose --profile only-api -f tools/docker-compose.dev.yml -f tools/docker-compose.override.yml -p p0 up --build
scripts.up:db: docker-compose --profile only-db -f tools/docker-compose.dev.yml -f tools/docker-compose.override.yml -p p0 up --build
scripts.clean:modules: rm yarn.lock yarn-error.log && find . -maxdepth 2 -type d -name node_modules -exec sudo rm -rf "{}" \;
scripts.clean:c: docker rm -v $(docker ps -aqf name=p0\*); docker volume prune -f
scripts.clean:c:i: yarn clean:c; docker image prune -f && docker image rm -f $(docker image ls -f reference="p0*" --format {{.ID}})
